name: Rigatoni with Four Cheeses
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Bel Paese or Taleggio cheese, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in salted water until tender but still firm to the bite.
2. Meanwhile, bring half and half to a simmer in a heavy skillet over medium-low heat.
3. Add Gorgonzola, Bel Paese and Fontina cheeses, stirring until melted.
4. Drain pasta and add to sauce. Toss to coat evenly.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Transfer mixture to a large bowl.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and parsley, then serve.
